title: HISMACITY pro research reports and Model Builder
author: Valentina Pica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: HISMACITY pro research reports and GIS model builder document, describing the formula of the composite indicators. The compressed folder contains the description of the first analysis and construction of the structure and the contents of the Protocol in the first report, of the research material and other important documents used in the research and production of the HISMACITY protocol for integrated interventions for the requalification of small historic centers.
